title: Avocado Bowl
description: Creamy avocado layered with grains and fresh vegetables. Balanced, nourishing, and built for steady energy.

title: Avocado Toast
description: Smashed avocado over crisp golden toast. Simple ingredients, clean flavor, effortless start.

title: Bibimbap
description: Warm rice topped with vegetables, egg, and spice. Colorful, bold, and deeply satisfying.

title: Butter Chicken
description: Tender chicken in rich tomato-butter sauce. Creamy, comforting, and full of warmth.

title: Butter Paneer
description: Soft paneer simmered in velvety spiced gravy. Rich, indulgent, and perfectly balanced.

title: Caesar Salad
description: Crisp lettuce tossed in creamy garlic dressing. Savory, fresh, and timeless.

title: Caprese Skewers
description: Juicy tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil in harmony. Bright, clean, and beautifully simple.

title: Cheese Quesadilla
description: Melted cheese folded in warm toasted tortilla. Golden, gooey, and comforting.

title: Chicken Shawarma
description: Spiced chicken wrapped with fresh toppings and sauce. Bold Middle Eastern flavors in every bite.

title: Empanadas
description: Golden pastry filled with seasoned goodness. Crisp outside, rich and savory inside.

title: Energy Bites
description: Nutty, chewy bites packed with oats and seeds. Quick fuel without the crash.

title: Falafel Wrap
description: Crispy chickpea falafel with fresh herbs and tahini. Earthy, vibrant, and satisfying.

title: French Toast
description: Soft bread soaked and pan-seared to golden perfection. Sweet, warm, and weekend-ready.

title: Fruit Nut Mix
description: Fresh fruit paired with crunchy roasted nuts. Naturally sweet with wholesome texture.

title: Goulash
description: Hearty stew slow-cooked with paprika and spices. Deep, rustic comfort in every spoon.

title: Greek Salad
description: Cucumber, olives, tomatoes, and feta in balance. Fresh, crisp, and Mediterranean at heart.

title: Hummus Veg
description: Creamy hummus layered with vibrant vegetables. Smooth, earthy, and nourishing.

title: Idli Sambar
description: Steamed rice cakes with spiced lentil stew. Light, comforting, and South Indian classic.

title: Jollof Rice
description: Tomato-infused rice cooked with bold spices. Smoky, vibrant, and full of character.

title: Khichdi
description: Rice and lentils cooked to soothing softness. Simple, gentle, and deeply comforting.

title: Lemon Chicken
description: Juicy chicken infused with fresh citrus and herbs. Light, bright, and flavorful.

title: Margherita Pizza
description: Thin crust topped with tomato, mozzarella, and basil. Classic Italian simplicity done right.

title: Masala Oats
description: Oats simmered with vegetables and Indian spices. Hearty, warm, and savory.

title: Mediterranean Chickpea
description: Spiced chickpeas with herbs and olive oil. Protein-rich, earthy, and satisfying.

title: Moong Dal Chilla
description: Savory lentil pancakes cooked till golden. Crisp edges, soft center, full of protein.

title: Moussaka
description: Layered eggplant baked with rich meat sauce. Creamy, hearty, and deeply traditional.

description: Crispy chips topped with fresh tomato salsa. Crunchy, zesty, and shareable.

title: Oats & Fruits
description: Warm oats topped with seasonal fruits. Naturally sweet and filling.

title: Pad Thai
description: Rice noodles tossed with tamarind and peanuts. Sweet, savory, and perfectly balanced.

title: Paella
description: Saffron rice cooked with seafood and spices. Bold, aromatic, and celebratory.

title: Pancakes
description: Fluffy stacks cooked to golden perfection. Soft, warm, and endlessly comforting.

title: Paneer Paratha
description: Stuffed flatbread filled with spiced paneer. Crisp outside, rich inside.

title: Peanut Banana Toast
description: Creamy peanut butter with sweet banana slices. Simple fuel with lasting energy.

title: Pho
description: Fragrant broth simmered with herbs and noodles. Light yet deeply flavorful.

title: Pierogi
description: Soft dumplings filled with savory stuffing. Comforting Eastern European classic.

title: Poke Bowl
description: Fresh raw fish over rice with vibrant toppings. Clean, colorful, and refreshing.

title: Ratatouille
description: Slow-cooked vegetables layered with herbs. Rustic French simplicity at its best.

description: Crispy oven-roasted chickpeas with spices. Crunchy, protein-rich snack.

title: Scrambled Eggs Toast

title: Shakshuka
description: Eggs poached in spiced tomato sauce. Bold, saucy, and vibrant.

title: Smoothie Bowl

description: Sushi-inspired bowl with rice and fresh toppings. Clean flavors, balanced textures.

title: Teriyaki Chicken

title: Tom Yum
description: Hot and sour Thai soup with herbs. Spicy, aromatic, and invigorating.

title: Upma
